devcon_intro.heading:
An open door for explorers,
a common ground for builders
devcon_intro.subheading: A gathering for Ethereum and the global movement building free, open, private, and verifiable systems.

venue.name: WORLD CENTRE
venue.address: G Block, Bandra Kurla Complex (BKC), Mumbai, India

what_to_expect.heading: What to expect
what_to_expect.subheading: Devcon is where the builders of a brighter future gather and co-create.

cards.title: Programming
cards.intro: Four days of technical depth and human connection.
cards.body: Explore multiple stages with programming that covers the full spectrum of Ethereum building.

cards.title: Community Hubs
cards.intro: Thematic spaces built by the ecosystem, for the ecosystem.
cards.body: Join specialized areas for deep dives into topics like account abstraction, public goods, and decentralized identity.

cards.title: Coworking Spaces
cards.intro: Integrated spaces designed for focus and coordination.
cards.body: Our coworking areas provide the infrastructure you need to stay productive and connected.

cards.title: Hands-on Experiences
cards.intro: Devcon is an experience you shape, not just an event you attend.
cards.body: Participate in interactive hands-on workshops, technical experiments, and live coding sessions.

keywords_desktop: CENSORSHIP RESISTANCE • OPEN SOURCE • PRIVACY • SECURITY
DeFI • Social • CYPHERPUNK • AI • REAL WORLD ETHEREUM

contribute.heading: Contribute and support
contribute.subheading:
At Devcon, every participant has a role.
Bring your project, host a space, or help build the experience itself.

cards.title: Speak at Devcon
cards.body: Help to shape the conversation at Devcon and engage 10,000+ builders, researchers, designers, and thinkers from across the decentralized ecosystem.

cards.title: Organize a Community Hub
cards.body: Community-led, educational and marketing-free spaces built around a specific topic in Ethereum, CROPS or FLOSS. Choose your topic, gather a team, post a proposal.

cards.title: Join the Road to Devcon
cards.body: Host a meetup, workshop, or side event as part of our Ecosystem Program and make it a part of the broader Devcon India story.

cards.title: Volunteer program
cards.body: Join a team of passionate contributors keeping Devcon running smoothly – from registration desks to behind-the-scenes management.

cards.title: Submit a DIP
cards.body: Devcon Improvement Proposals (DIPs) are ways for the community to suggest things to add, remove, or improve at the upcoming Devcon.

cards.title: Join our Creative Crew
cards.body: Create content. Build hype. Grow the community. If you've got reach and a genuine love for the ecosystem, we want to collaborate with you.

item_1.q: When will General ticket sales start?
item_1.a: General Admission ticket sales for Devcon India will launch in early May. Stay tuned for updates as we get closer to this date.

item_2.q: Will there be opportunities to obtain discounted tickets?
item_2.a_intro: Yes! There will be multiple ways to obtain discounted tickets this year:
item_2.community_b: This will consist of groups like Protocol Guild members, OSS Contributors and more.
item_2.applications_b: This will include Builder Discounts, Student Discounts, and Youth Tickets for those under 18.
item_2.ecosystem_b: An application will be open for leaders & organizers of various web2 & web3 communities or meetups to apply for free or discounted tickets for their groups.

item_3.q: Can I purchase tickets with crypto?
item_3.a: Yes! You will be able to choose between Credit Card or Crypto to pay for your ticket. Orders paid in Crypto receive a 3% discount on the total cost.
